title: Senior Plant Manager at CEAT Tyres

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at CEAT Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? CEAT Tyres in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CEAT Tyres:
CEAT Tyres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres!
